g.text: An Interactive Timeline of Vertical Aviation Milestones

span.style: background-color: #e11d48; color: white; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; margin-right: 12px;

div.p: Click on any of the milestone nodes above to explore the historical events, brilliant inventions, and pioneering flights that made modern vertical lift a reality.
